tagline: Authentic Mexican classics. A Burbank tradition.

hero.heading: Authentic Mexican Flavors
hero.subheading: Family-recipe tacos, burritos, and combo plates served fresh every day in the heart of Burbank.

about.heading: 566 reviews. 4.3 stars. Generations of regulars.
paragraphs: Alfredo's has been serving Burbank's favorite Mexican food for years — the kind of place where the carnitas are slow-cooked, the tortillas are warm, and your usual order is known before you walk in.
Whether you're stopping in for a quick lunch or feeding the whole family, every plate comes out the way it's supposed to: bold, generous, and made with care.

services.title: Burritos & Tacos
services.description: Hand-rolled burritos and street-style tacos packed with carne asada, al pastor, carnitas, or chicken.

services.title: Combo Plates
services.description: Hearty platters with rice, beans, and your choice of enchiladas, chile rellenos, tamales, or tostadas.

services.title: Tortas & Quesadillas
services.description: Generous Mexican sandwiches on telera rolls and crispy cheese quesadillas with all the fixings.

services.title: Family Pack
services.description: Feed four with a mix of proteins, sides, rice, beans, and a stack of warm tortillas.

services.title: Desayuno All Day
services.description: Huevos rancheros, chilaquiles, breakfast burritos — Mexican breakfast served from open to close.

services.title: Catering
services.description: Office lunches, birthdays, quinces, family gatherings — call ahead for trays.

reviews.name: Maria L.
reviews.text: Best al pastor in Burbank, hands down. I've been coming here for years and they have never missed.

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: Generous portions, fair prices, and the salsa bar alone is worth the trip. The carnitas burrito is unreal.

reviews.name: Jessica T.
reviews.text: Family-run feel. They remember your order, they are fast, and the food is consistently good every single time.

contact.address: 911 N San Fernando Blvd, Burbank, CA
contact.mapEmbedQuery: Alfredo's Mexican Food, 911 N San Fernando Blvd, Burbank, CA

seo.title: Alfredo's Mexican Food — Authentic Mexican Restaurant in Burbank, CA
seo.description: Family-recipe tacos, burritos, combo plates, and catering in Burbank. Open daily 9 AM – 9 PM. Call (818) 972-2625.
